titleStmt.title: SII 34.50: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 50. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājarāja II, 11th year = A.D. 1157.
Gift of 30 kasu for a lamp by a dancing girl called Taḍuttāṭkoṇḍāḷ Chaḍaimēlirundāḷ alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira-naṅgai of the temple of Tiruvaigāvuḍaiyār in Aṇḍāṭṭu-kūṟṟam of Vikramachōḻavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātuñ ceyamātu nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pulka Arumaṟaivi
ti neṟiyanaittum taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimai maṇimuṭicūṭi tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭai ticaikaḷiṟeṭṭun taṅkutaṉikūṭaṉ tāṉeṉa vi
ḷaṅka karuṅkali paṭṭiyai ceṅkōl turappa peruṅkatirāḻi pulivaḷattuṭaṉ vara villavariraṭṭa mīnava ciṅkaṇar pallava
nutaliyar pārttiva paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅkaṟpil maṇṇakam purantu cempon vīrasiṅṅāsanattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyā
ḷōṭum vīṟṟirun taruḷiya kōpparakēcaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājarājatēvarkku yā
ṇṭu 11 Āvatu vikkirama cōḻavaḷanāṭṭu Aṇṭāṭṭukkūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tiruvaikāuṭaiyār kōyil muppatu vaṭṭattu
civappirāmaṇarōm Ikkōyil tēvaraṭiyāḷ taṭuttāṭ koṇṭāḷ caṭaimēliruntāḷāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyira naṅkai pakkal
nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 3 10 Ikkācu muppatukkum polikūlikkuc celavāka yāṇṭu 10 1 Āka Aṟpikai viṣū mutal Erikkakkaṭavō
māna tiruṉuntāviḷakku 1 It tiruṉuntāviḷakku Onṟum santirātittavarai Erikka kaṭavomāka sammatittōm
muppatu vaṭṭattu civappirāmaṇarōm Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 34.50 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
